title: jasione crispa subsp. lanuginella
intro: Jasione crispa subsp. lanuginella, also known as woolly bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of woolly bellflower include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
